sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Bank of America Corporation $BAC Shares Bought by New York State Teachers Retirement System
feed.summary: New York State Teachers Retirement System increased its stake in Bank of America by 0.3%, acquiring an additional 16,932 shares. This brings their total holding to 5,394,623 shares, valued at approximately $296.7 million. The article also notes that institutional investors collectively own about 70.71% of BAC, while company insiders have sold shares totaling $11.09 million over the past 90 days.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NYSE: INVH) holds 7.23% stake in Invitation Homes
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a beneficial ownership of 43,361,565 shares, or 7.23%, of Invitation Homes Inc. (INVH) common stock as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made in a Schedule 13G filing, indicating Vanguard holds sole voting power for 6,187,639 shares and sole dispositive power for all 43,361,565 shares. The filing, signed on April 30, 2026, emphasizes that this is a passive investment, not intended to influence control of the issuer.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] LINDE PLC Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing a passive beneficial ownership of 34,874,653 shares of Linde PLC (LIN), which represents 7.52% of the outstanding common stock. The filing indicates Vanguard holds sole voting power over 4,641,583 shares and sole dispositive power over all 34,874,653 shares. This ownership reflects an investment in the ordinary course of business, not an attempt to influence control of the issuer.

feed.title: Bay Area Host Committee Opens Nominations for 2026 BAHC Impact Awards Presented by PNC Bank
feed.summary: The Bay Area Host Committee has opened nominations for its 2026 BAHC Impact Awards, presented by PNC Bank. These awards recognize individuals and organizations in the Bay Area who leverage sports and business to create significant community impact. The program features five categories, including Sports Leadership, Sports Business Champion, Originators, Women's Confidence, and Community Impact, with nominations open until July 19.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management reports 7.33% stake in Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 99,658,889 shares, representing 7.33% of Keurig Dr Pepper's (KDP) common stock, according to a Schedule 13G SEC filing. This passive investment indicates Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 13,693,189 shares. The filing underscores a significant institutional holding in the beverage company.

feed.title: Doxis Named a Leader in Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Document Management 2026
feed.summary: Doxis, "The Document Intelligence Company," has been recognized as a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Document Management for the second consecutive time. This acknowledgment highlights the power of the Doxis platform in helping customers achieve AI-readiness by connecting, understanding, and automating information across the entire document lifecycle. The recognition follows a year of significant growth, strategic investments, and enhancements to their AI-first Doxis Intelligent Content Automation platform, including Doxis AI.dp and expanded integration ecosystems.

feed.title: Chipotle's Q1 earnings: Tech, sauce innovation drive transaction growth
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill achieved transaction growth in Q1 2026, reaching $3.1 billion in revenue despite a difficult consumer environment and a 17% dip in adjusted EPS due to increased costs. CEO Scott Boatwright attributed this success to a "Recipe for Growth" focusing on efficiency through technology, innovative sauces attracting new customers, gamification of in-restaurant experiences, and strategic expansion of catering services. These four pillars collectively drove comparable sales outperformance and significantly increased customer engagement and new loyalty members.

feed.title: Iron Mountain Q1 2026 slides: organic growth hits 25-year high
feed.summary: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) reported record first-quarter 2026 results, achieving 17% organic revenue growth, its highest in over 25 years, and subsequently raised its full-year guidance across all key metrics. The company's strategic focus on data center, asset lifecycle management, and digital solutions is accelerating, with these segments now comprising 33% of total revenue. The data center business, in particular, is expanding rapidly to meet AI and hyperscale demand, projecting over $1 billion in annual revenue by 2026.

feed.title: Transcript: Mid-America Apartment Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Mid-America Apartment (MAA) reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter results, driven by robust resident retention, disciplined expense management, and resilient demand across its high-growth markets. The company saw sequential improvement in lease pricing and maintained stable occupancy, with new supply being absorbed effectively. MAA is continuing its development focus, expecting to start construction on four projects in 2026, and also conducted $73 million in share repurchases during the quarter.

feed.title: Valero Energy Q1 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
feed.summary: Valero Energy reported a net income of $1.3 billion for Q1 2026, a significant turnaround from a net loss in Q1 2025, driven by strong refining and profitable renewable diesel segments. The company is advancing the FTC unit optimization project at its St. Charles refinery and issued $850 million in 10-year notes to manage debt. Despite operational challenges like a Port Arthur refinery fire and the idling of the Benicia refinery, management expressed optimism about future refining margins due to constrained global capacity and strong demand, maintaining a disciplined financial strategy and commitment to shareholder returns.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Has Lowered Expectations for St. James's Place (LON:STJ) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has slightly reduced its price target for St. James's Place (LON:STJ) to GBX 1,663 from GBX 1,686, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of approximately 37.9%. Other analysts also hold a generally positive outlook, with the stock currently having a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target price of GBX 1,675.43.

feed.title: Lloyds Banking Group (LON:LLOY) Given "Outperform" Rating at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has reiterated an "Outperform" rating for Lloyds Banking Group (LON:LLOY), setting a price target of GBX 120, which implies a 21.5% upside. The rating follows Lloyds' Q1 results, which surpassed expectations with GBX 2.40 EPS and GBX 478.5 billion revenue, along with reaffirmed 2026 guidance and ongoing share buybacks. Despite a systems incident affecting 500,000 customers and management's caution on a weaker UK economic outlook, the analyst consensus for Lloyds remains a "Moderate Buy."

feed.title: General Mills Emissions Drop Slows in Fiscal 2025 as Water Use Rises
feed.summary: General Mills reported a slowdown in its supply chain greenhouse gas emissions reduction in fiscal 2025, with a 14% drop from a 2020 baseline, compared to a 19% reduction in fiscal 2024. The company also saw an increase in water use per ton of finished product and continued challenges in meeting animal welfare standards for broiler chickens. On a positive note, all manufacturing facilities achieved zero-waste-to-landfill status, and 95% of packaging was designed to be recyclable or reusable.

feed.title: Food giants hit with consumer lawsuit calling ultraprocessed ingredients addictive
feed.summary: A new consumer lawsuit has been filed against major packaged food companies, including Kraft Heinz and PepsiCo, seeking $1 billion in damages. The complaint alleges that ultraprocessed foods are intentionally engineered to be addictive and contribute to health issues, drawing parallels to the tobacco industry. This lawsuit attempts to strengthen the link between processed food consumption and adverse health outcomes, a challenge that led to the dismissal of a similar case last fall.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 49.3M-share stake in Host Hotels (NYSE: HST)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a 7.16% stake in Host Hotels & Resorts Inc (NYSE: HST) as of March 31, 2026, through a Schedule 13G filing. This amounts to 49,305,047 beneficially owned shares, held on behalf of various Vanguard affiliates and clients. The filing indicates Vanguard possesses sole dispositive power over all these shares, but sole voting power over only 6,152,907 shares.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies reported a strong Q1 2026 with record revenues, increased free cash flow, and significant share repurchases. The company discussed its successful acquisition of For The Record, contributing approximately $30 million to future revenues, and highlighted strong public sector demand and ongoing cloud transition momentum. Management expressed high confidence in AI initiatives and their strategic 2030 targets.

feed.title: Vanguard discloses 5.28M-share stake in Insulet (NASDAQ: PODD)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 5,277,842 shares, representing a 7.49% stake in Insulet Corp (NASDAQ: PODD), as detailed in a recent Schedule 13G SEC filing. The filing, signed by Ashley Grim on April 30, 2026, indicates Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 698,568 shares, reflecting a passive investment. This disclosure is based on ownership as of March 31, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard discloses 152.4M shares in Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ: HBAN)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a beneficial ownership of 152.4 million shares, or a 7.48% stake, in Huntington Bancshares Inc. (NASDAQ: HBAN) as of March 31, 2026. This filing, a Schedule 13G, indicates Vanguard's passive investment intent, holding these shares across its managed funds and accounts. While Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares, its sole voting power is limited to 20.6 million shares.

feed.title: Consumers Energy (NYSE: CMS) previews First Mortgage bond offering with tax‑credit redemption
feed.summary: Consumers Energy Company (NYSE: CMS) has filed a preliminary prospectus supplement for a new series of First Mortgage Bonds. The proceeds from this offering are earmarked to redeem existing 5.24% First Mortgage Bonds due May 15, 2026, and for general corporate purposes, including short-term debt repayment. A notable feature is a "Tax Credit Event" redemption at 101% of the principal amount if specific conditions related to tax credit eligibility due to foreign entity ownership are met.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: HUBB) reports 3,978,074 shares, 7.5% stake in Hubbell
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a 7.5% beneficial ownership stake in Hubbell Inc (NYSE: HUBB), totaling 3,978,074 shares, through a Schedule 13G filing. The filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 519,838 shares. This is a routine disclosure for an institutional investor holding over 5% of a company's common stock, reflecting a passive investment.

feed.title: Honda Launches a Scooter Result of the Combination of PCX and Vario, Price Rp33 Million
feed.summary: Honda has launched the NS150ES 2026 scooter in China, blending the comfort of a touring scooter with the agility of a sports bike, visually reminiscent of a combination between Honda's PCX and Vario models. Priced from approximately Rp33 million, it is powered by a 149cc engine and features a premium design, practical elements like an 8-liter fuel tank, and advanced options such as a dashcam and smartphone connectivity in its Pro variant. This model aims to attract the Asian market by offering a new niche that balances both performance and comfort.

feed.title: Vanguard (QBTS) reports 18.65M shares, 5.08% stake in D‑Wave
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a significant 5.08% stake in D-Wave Quantum Inc. (QBTS), holding 18.65 million shares as per a recent Schedule 13G SEC filing. This filing, made on April 29, 2026, indicates Vanguard's passive institutional ownership with sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 2.8 million shares, aggregating holdings from various Vanguard-managed funds and affiliates. The disclosure provides transparency on the ownership landscape without suggesting any activist intent.

feed.title: Palvella Therapeutics to Host First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Corporate Update Conference Call on May 7, 2026
feed.summary: Palvella Therapeutics announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Thursday, May 7, 2026. Management will host a conference call on the same day at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results and provide a corporate update. Investors can access the webcast or join by phone using the provided details.

feed.title: Chubb VCT Alliance Puts Clinical Trial Risk And Valuation In Focus
feed.summary: Chubb (NYSE:CB) has formed an alliance with Verified Clinical Trials (VCT) to enhance clinical trial risk management for its life science and clinical research clients. This partnership aims to integrate VCT's subject registry technology into Chubb's offerings, addressing operational, financial, regulatory, and liability risks while improving participant safety and data quality. For investors, this move strengthens Chubb's position in specialty risk and aligns with industry trends towards data integrity in research.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies, Inc. 2026 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NYSE:TYL)
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies, Inc. (TYL) has released its Q1 2026 earnings call presentation, reporting an EPS of $3.09, beating estimates by $0.08. The company also announced revenue of $613.50M, an 8.55% year-over-year increase, surpassing expectations by $4.44M. This presentation accompanies the Q1 2026 earnings call, providing further details on the financial results.

feed.title: How Amex is Using GenAI to Augment Human Service for the Platinum Card Customers
feed.summary: American Express is integrating GenAI into its Platinum Card customer service to enhance the human touch rather than replace it. The "Travel Counselor Assist" program utilizes AI to streamline routine tasks, freeing up human consultants to focus on complex bookings and critical "moments of truth" for premium members. This approach has already reduced customer request resolution time and aims to improve overall customer satisfaction and consultant efficiency across 19 countries.

feed.title: Fund Update: 12,200 BANK OF AMERICA (BAC) shares added to Mn Services Vermogensbeheer B.V. portfolio
feed.summary: Mn Services Vermogensbeheer B.V. has increased its holdings in Bank of America (BAC) by adding 12,200 shares to its portfolio as of the Q1 2026 report period. The article also details recent institutional investor activity, insider trading, congressional stock trading, and current analyst ratings and price targets for BAC.

feed.title: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) Trading 8.6% Higher After Better-Than-Expected Earnings
feed.summary: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) shares surged by 8.6% following a better-than-expected earnings announcement, with the company reporting $1.43 EPS against an estimated $0.52. The firm also raised its full-year 2026 guidance, citing booming demand for data center capacity driven by AI workloads. Despite strong performance, some investors are monitoring the reported low net margin and negative return on equity.

feed.title: BMS positions Cobenfy as safer alternative ahead of pivotal Alzheimer’s psychosis readout
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb is promoting its schizophrenia drug Cobenfy as a potentially safer treatment for Alzheimer's disease psychosis, a condition affecting 30-50% of Alzheimer's patients for which no approved treatments currently exist. Unlike existing antipsychotics and some Alzheimer's therapies that carry boxed warnings for elderly patients, Cobenfy does not have such warnings, making safety a key differentiator. The company is awaiting pivotal Phase 3 ADEPT-2 study data later this year, which was delayed in late 2025 due to "irregularities" at some study sites.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Lennox International to $600 From $592
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Lennox International (LII) from $592 to $600. This news was published on April 30, 2026, at 10:32 am EDT. Lennox International is a provider of climate control solutions, manufacturing products for heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration markets.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (HSIC) reports 6.36% ownership in Henry Schein
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 6.36% beneficial ownership stake in Henry Schein Inc. through a Schedule 13G SEC filing. This represents 7,302,660 shares of Common Stock as of March 31, 2026, with Vanguard exercising sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 879,493 shares. The filing indicates these holdings are for various Vanguard funds and managed accounts, aligning with typical institutional passive reporting.

feed.title: Teledyne unifies ChartWorld, Raymarine Commercial under single navigation brand
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies Inc. has consolidated its ChartWorld and Raymarine Commercial entities into a single global navigation brand, Raymarine Commercial. This integration brings together digital navigation services, hardware, and support, aiming to streamline the delivery of navigation systems and services to commercial vessel operators. The move is intended to better serve customers as the maritime industry transitions to more connected, data-driven, and regulated operating environments.

feed.title: Verity Asset Management Inc. Sells 2,317 Shares of Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
feed.summary: Verity Asset Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Lockheed Martin Corporation by 47.2% in Q4, selling 2,317 shares and retaining 2,587 shares valued at $1.251 million. This comes after Lockheed Martin missed recent quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, although the company secured a $1.13 billion HIMARS production contract and has a strong order backlog. Analysts currently have an average "Hold" rating for the stock with a target price of $632.58, citing peer performance and policy risks as potential short-term pressures.

feed.title: Spectrum Financial Alliance Ltd LLC Buys 11,176 Shares of Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
feed.summary: Spectrum Financial Alliance Ltd LLC increased its stake in Lockheed Martin Corporation by 12.7%, acquiring an additional 11,176 shares to hold a total of 98,931 shares worth approximately $47.85 million. Lockheed Martin won a $1.13 billion HIMARS contract and is involved in next-generation aerospace programs, but missed quarterly EPS estimates and holds a "Hold" consensus analyst rating.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NYSE: HII) reports 2.89M shares, 7.34% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 2.89 million shares, equating to a 7.34% stake in Huntington Ingalls Industries Inc (NYSE: HII), as detailed in a Schedule 13G SEC filing. feed.title: Gilead Sciences, Inc. $GILD Shares Sold by Verity Asset Management Inc.
feed.summary: Verity Asset Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Gilead Sciences by almost 50%, selling 10,237 shares and leaving it with a 10,357-share holding valued at $1.27 million. Despite this institutional sale, Gilead shows near-term growth catalysts, including FDA priority review for an HIV regimen and a $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx. The company also raised its quarterly dividend, and analysts maintain a bullish average price target of $157.35, even as insiders like the CEO and CFO have been net sellers.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (INCY) discloses 6.32% ownership in Incyte Corp
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a 6.32% passive ownership stake in Incyte Corp (INCY) through a Schedule 13G filing. The filing, signed on April 30, 2026, reflects holdings as of March 31, 2026, across Vanguard funds and managed accounts.

feed.title: Synchrony Expands Partnership with Lowe's as New Issuer of Co-Brand Credit Card for Home Improvement Professionals
feed.summary: Synchrony has expanded its partnership with Lowe's to become the new issuer of the MyLowe's Pro Rewards American Express® Card, aimed at home improvement professionals. This new co-brand card, which can be used anywhere American Express is accepted, complements the existing Lowe's in-store card and offers rewards points on eligible purchases with no annual fee. The collaboration seeks to provide a seamless experience, smarter digital servicing, and flexible financing for Lowe's Pro customers.

feed.title: Verity Asset Management Inc. Sells 15,105 Shares of International Business Machines Corporation $IBM
feed.summary: Verity Asset Management Inc. reduced its stake in International Business Machines (IBM) by 44.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 15,105 shares and retaining 18,825 shares valued at approximately $5.58 million. Despite this reduction, IBM remains its fourth-largest holding. The article also notes that IBM recently exceeded earnings expectations, raised its quarterly dividend, and has seen increased holdings by corporate insiders.

feed.title: McDonald’s lawsuit by two former Black executives to go to trial
feed.summary: A lawsuit filed by two former Black senior executives, Victoria Guster-Hines and Domineca Neal, against McDonald’s USA for alleged racial discrimination and a hostile work environment is proceeding to trial on September 14 in federal court in Chicago. The lawsuit, initially filed in January 2020, alleges that the executives experienced discriminatory practices, including demotions as part of a "ruthless purge" of African Americans from senior corporate ranks, and unlawful termination for Neal. While allegations of racial discrimination and retaliation against McDonald’s Corp. and its CEO were dismissed, the case against McDonald’s USA for hostile work environment and unlawful retaliation remains.
